property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: build/sbt-launch-1.9.9.jar set every scalafmtCheck := {} set (kernelUnityCatalog / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty set (kernelDefaults / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty spark/testOnly org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1InsertIntoSuite

testcase.name: replaceOn with always-true condition replaces all rows
replaceOn with always-false condition appends all rows
basic replaceOn with single matching column

testcase.name: replaceOn with condition referencing only source side
replaceOn with IN predicate in condition

failure.message: org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.ExtendedAnalysisException: [UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.WITH_SUGGESTION] A column, variable, or function parameter with name `t`.`id` cannot be resolved. testcase.name: replaceOn with space containing targetAlias without backticks fails to parse
replaceOn with non-Delta source records materialization reason, materializationMode=none

failure.message: org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.ExtendedAnalysisException: [UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.WITH_SUGGESTION] A column, variable, or function parameter with name `t`.`col` cannot be resolved. Did you mean one of the following? [`col`, `row_origin`]. SQLSTATE: 42703; line 1 pos 0; 'DeltaDelete exists#21356 ['t.col] : +- 'Project [1 AS __dummy_name_for_a_constant#21355] : +- 'Filter ('t.col = col#21345) : +- SubqueryAlias s : +- SubqueryAlias spark_catalog.default.source : +- Relation spark_catalog.default.source[col#21345,row_origin#21346] csv +- Relation [col#21357,row_origin#21358] parquet

testcase.name: replaceOn with non-deterministic source records materialization reason

failure.message: org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.ExtendedAnalysisException: [UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.WITH_SUGGESTION] A column, variable, or function parameter with name `t`.`col` cannot be resolved. Did you mean one of the following? [`col`, `row_origin`]. SQLSTATE: 42703; line 1 pos 0; 'DeltaDelete exists#23513 ['t.col] : +- 'Project [1 AS __dummy_name_for_a_constant#23512] : +- 'Filter ('t.col = col#23350) : +- LogicalRDD [col#23350, row_origin#23351], false +- Relation [col#23514,row_origin#23515] parquet

testcase.name: insertInto: replaceOn with misaligned columns

failure.message: org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.ExtendedAnalysisException: [UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.WITH_SUGGESTION] A column, variable, or function parameter with name `t`.`id` cannot be resolved. Did you mean one of the following? [`id`, `data`]. SQLSTATE: 42703; line 1 pos 0; 'DeltaDelete exists#29581 ['t.id] : +- 'Project [1 AS __dummy_name_for_a_constant#29580] : +- 'Filter ('t.id >= 1) : +- LogicalRDD [data#29572, id#29573], false +- Relation [id#29582,data#29583] parquet
